title: Moist Dumplings with Spicy Ethiopian Sauce
description: A flavorful and moist dumpling dish served with a spicy and tangy Ethiopian-inspired sauce. This recipe is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: 1. Cook the dumplings according to the package instructions.
2. In a pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened.
4. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart with a spoon.
5. Add the Ethiopian spice mix and stir to combine.
6. Add the cooked dumplings to the pan and stir to combine.
7. In a small bowl, mix together the moist mayonnaise and 1 tsp of water.
8. Add the mayonnaise mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
9. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
10. Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
